name: Italian Spinach Ricotta Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Prick the pie shell and bake for 15 minutes. Remove from oven.
3. Melt butter in a frying pan. Add onions and cook until soft.
4. Squeeze the spinach to remove moisture and add it to the onions, stirring.
5. Combine remaining ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
6. Pour the mixture into the baked shell.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 to 45 minutes or until the top is golden brown. Serves: 6 to 8.
